# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service-backend
    protocol: http
    host: user-service-backend
    port: 8080
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    retries: 5
    tags:
      - user-management
      - microservices
    routes:
      - name: user-api-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        tags:
          - user-api

upstreams:
  - name: user-service-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    hash_on_cookie_path: /
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        http_path: /health
        https_verify_certificate: true
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 302
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 404
            - 500
            - 501
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
            - 505
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 5
      passive:
        healthy:
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 201
            - 202
            - 203
            - 204
            - 205
            - 206
            - 207
            - 208
            - 226
            - 300
            - 301
            - 302
            - 303
            - 304
            - 305
            - 306
            - 307
            - 308
          successes: 5
        unhealthy:
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 503
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 7
          http_failures: 5
    tags:
      - user-upstream
    targets:
      - target: user-service-instance-1:8080
        weight: 100
        tags:
          - primary
      - target: user-service-instance-2:8080
        weight: 100
        tags:
          - secondary
      - target: user-service-instance-3:8080
        weight: 100
        tags:
          - tertiary

  - name: product-service-upstream
    algorithm: least-connections
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    hash_on_cookie_path: /
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:

        concurrency: 10
        http_path: /health

          http_statuses:

            - 503

          timeouts: 7
          http_failures: 5

        weight: 100
        tags:
          - primary
      - target: product-service-instance-2:8081
        weight: 100
        tags:
          - secondary

  - name: order-service-upstream
    algorithm: consistent-hashing
    hash_on: header
    hash_on_header: X-Session-ID
    hash_fallback: ip
    hash_on_cookie_path: /
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        http_path: /health
        https_verify_certificate: true
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          http_statuses:
            - 200
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 503
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 5
    tags:
      - order-upstream
    targets:
      - target: order-service-instance-1:8082
        weight: 100
        tags:
          - primary
      - target: order-service-instance-2:8082
        weight: 100
        tags:
          - secondary
      - target: order-service-instance-3:8082
        weight: 50
        tags:
          - backup

  - name: payment-service-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        http_path: /health
        https_verify_certificate: true

          successes: 2

          tcp_failures: 2

        weight: 100

          - secondary

    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:

        concurrency: 10

        weight: 100

  - name: analytics-service-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        timeout: 2
        concurrency: 5
        http_path: /health
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          http_statuses:
            - 200
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 503
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 5
          http_failures: 5
    tags:
      - analytics-upstream
    targets:
      - target: analytics-service-instance-1:8085
        weight: 100

plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 100
      hour: 1000
      policy: local
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false
    enabled: true
    protocols:
      - http
      - https

  - name: correlation-id
    config:
      header_name: X-Correlation-ID
      generator: uuid
      echo_downstream: true
    enabled: true

  - name: request-id
    config:
      header_name: X-Request-ID
      generator: uuid
      echo_downstream: true
    enabled: true

  - name: prometheus
    config:
      per_consumer: true
    enabled: true

  - name: http-log
    config:
      http_endpoint: http://log-collector:8086/logs
      method: POST
      timeout: 10000
      keepalive: 60000
      flush_timeout: 2
      retry_count: 10
    enabled: true

  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - "*"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - PATCH
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Accept-Version
        - Content-Length
        - Content-MD5
        - Content-Type
        - Date
        - X-Auth-Token
        - Authorization
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Auth-Token
        - X-Request-ID
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false
    enabled: true

consumers:
  - username: api-client-1
    custom_id: client-1
    tags:
      - external-client
  
  - username: api-client-2
    custom_id: client-2
    tags:
      - external-client

  - username: internal-service
    custom_id: internal-1
    tags:
      - internal-client
